forgotPassword.subtitle: Reset your password in just a few steps

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 20 characters

validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 20 characters

turnstile.verificationDesc: For your account security, please complete the human verification
